title: Hat-trick for Shakhtar Star
content: What a performance from Meleh 🇧🇾 :  tonight. This wasn’t just a good game - this was complete domination. Three goals , one assist, and every single time he touched the ball he looked dangerous. The movement, the composure, the confidence… absolutely elite from the FC Shakhtar Donetsk star.The first goal showed pure striker instinct, the second was all about technique, and the third completed a world-class hat-trick. But what impressed me most was the assist — instead of forcing another shot for himself, Meleh 🇧🇾 kept his head up and created for his teammate. That tells you everything about his football IQ and mentality.He played with intensity from the first minute until the last. Pressing defenders, linking the attack,creating space — he looked unstoppable. This is the type of performance that changes games, lifts the entire team, and makes fans believe they are watching a future superstar 🌟.If Meleh 🇧🇾 continues performing like this, defenders in the league are going to have nightmares. Tonight, he wasn’t just the man of the match — he was the difference maker, the leader, and the heart of Shakhtar’s attack.And you have to Remember Meleh Words.God Is Always With Me.

title: Shakhtar Ultras Performance against Polisssya
content: Shakhtar didn’t just win tonight - they devoured the opposition with relentless intensity, brutal pressing and pure dominance, turning the pitch into a battlefield where every attack felt inevitable, every duel was theirs and every minute carried the energy of a side playing with pride, hunger and the ruthless mentality of champions.

title: Chornomorets VS Bukovyna
content: Under the lights in Odesa, Chornomorets face a dangerous Bukovyna side in a clash where intensity, discipline and mentality could decide everything, with the hosts looking to control the tempo through experience while Bukovyna arrive hungry to prove they can compete with anyone and turn this matchday into a statement performance.

title: UPL Pre-Season Cup
description: League board are set to warm up the league
content: Since the start of official UPL26 league is May 29th,the league board decided to not only host pre-season friendlies but also host a little pre-season tournament,where 4 teams will compete to become the UPL26 Pre-Season Champions and start the season with small advantages.
